author: y4rr
content: Result: conformance_vision_io.rs extended from 8 to 12 tests. All pass. New tests: JPEG lossy tolerance (tensor and RawImage paths), raw binary f32/f64 round-trip. BEFORE: only PNG round-trip tested. AFTER: PNG (lossless exact), JPEG (lossy MAE tolerance), raw binary (exact). 12/12 tests pass.
